description: Install a dedicated 20A circuit for the espresso machine at Maple Street Cafe to resolve recurring breaker trips. Scope limited to one home run from the storefront panel. Rollback is removal of the new breaker and restoring the existing feed. Requested by Tina Caruso.
short_description: Add dedicated espresso circuit - Maple Street Cafe

description: Re-seal pole base hand hole and inspect supply conductors on the northeast pole at Brighton Pointe to stop repeat head failures. Bucket truck required. Rollback is restoring temporary head and rescheduling. Requested by Karen Whitfield.
short_description: Pole base reseal and conductor inspection - Brighton Pointe

description: Install a dedicated 30A circuit for the walk-in cooler at Sharon Hill Pharmacy and replace start contactor and capacitor. After-hours window to avoid product loss. Rollback is restoring the shared feed. Requested by Nadia Osei.
short_description: Dedicated cooler circuit and contactor replacement - Sharon Hill Pharmacy

description: Phased replacement of all original exit/emergency combo units at Delco Plaza after repeat egress test failures. Scope is six units across the plaza. Rollback is reinstalling original units. Requested by Joel Reyes.
short_description: Replace exit/emergency combo units - Delco Plaza

description: Install service-entrance surge protective device plus point-of-use protection at Westgate Commons to address repeat surge damage. Brief outage required to land the SPD. Rollback is removal of the SPD. Requested by Donna Friel.
short_description: Whole-building surge protection install - Westgate Commons

description: LED retrofit of aisle 3 lighting at Broad Street Hardware to eliminate failing magnetic ballasts. Scope is twelve fixtures. Rollback is reinstalling existing fixtures. Requested by Sal Mancini.
short_description: LED lighting retrofit - Broad Street Hardware aisle 3

description: Re-terminate aluminum panel feeder at Westgate Commons unit 6 with antioxidant compound and torque audit to resolve recurring loose neutral. After-hours window. Rollback is restoring original terminations. Requested by Donna Friel.
short_description: Panel feeder re-termination and torque audit - Westgate Commons unit 6

description: Install dedicated lighting contactor and timeclock for exterior wall packs at Aldan Business Center to stop daytime-on photocell issues. Rollback is restoring photocell-only control. Requested by Carl Hutchins.
short_description: Exterior lighting contactor and timeclock install - Aldan Business Center

description: Rework Concord Crossing walkway bollard wiring into conduit at correct depth to prevent landscaping damage. Trenching required along the planting bed. Rollback is restoring direct-buried feed. Requested by Patrice Coleman.
short_description: Bollard wiring conduit rework - Concord Crossing walkway

description: Replace high-temp rated LED drivers and add pole-top ventilation at Marple Crossing loading dock to stop repeat driver burnout. Bucket truck required. Rollback is standard drivers. Requested by Lauren Eberle.
short_description: High-temp driver and ventilation upgrade - Marple Crossing dock

description: Split the Lansdowne Medical Plaza break room circuit so microwave and refrigerator are on separate lines, resolving recurring GFCI trips. Rollback is restoring the combined circuit. Requested by Erik Sandberg.
short_description: Break room circuit split - Lansdowne Medical Plaza

description: Replace cracked in-use covers and GFCI devices at all exterior receptacles at Glenolden Self Storage to prevent rain-related gate outages. Rollback is restoring existing covers. Requested by Bill Tran.
short_description: Exterior GFCI and cover replacement - Glenolden Self Storage

description: Inspect and re-terminate the dryer feeder and upgrade the 30A breaker at Drexel Hill Dry Cleaners after repeat overheating. After-hours to avoid downtime. Rollback is restoring original breaker. Requested by Hassan Farouk.
short_description: Dryer feeder re-termination and breaker upgrade - Drexel Hill Dry Cleaners

description: Phased replacement of stairwell emergency units at Ridgeway Office Park on a tracked schedule by install date to end clustered failures. Scope is eight units. Rollback is keeping existing units. Requested by Greg Albano.
short_description: Phased emergency unit replacement - Ridgeway Office Park

description: Add a 100A subfeed panel at the Hargrove jobsite to support two new rooftop units per the load calc. Coordinated outage with the GC. Rollback is removal of the subfeed. Requested by Raj Patel.
short_description: Subfeed panel install for rooftop units - Hargrove jobsite

description: Reseal channel-letter raceway and install weatherproof LED modules at Yeadon Corner Market to stop repeat sign failures. Rollback is restoring existing modules. Requested by Priya Menon.
short_description: Sign raceway reseal and module upgrade - Yeadon Corner Market

description: Install EV charger holster cover and correct drip loop at Concord Crossing retail lot to eliminate moisture ground faults. Rollback is restoring the existing holster. Requested by Patrice Coleman.
short_description: EV charger weatherproofing - Concord Crossing lot

description: Proactive replacement of backstabbed devices with side-wire terminations on affected circuits in Springfield Commerce Plaza suite 2. Rollback is restoring original devices. Requested by Owen Brzezinski.
short_description: Device replacement to side-wire - Springfield Commerce suite 2

description: Verify all circuits and install typed panel directories at the Hargrove jobsite before final inspection. Standing as-built verification step. Rollback is not applicable. Requested by Raj Patel.
short_description: Panel directory verification and relabel - Hargrove handover

description: Replace humidity-rated occupancy sensor switch and relocate the sensor head in the Maple Street Cafe restroom to stop early failures. Rollback is restoring the existing sensor. Requested by Tina Caruso.
short_description: Occupancy sensor upgrade - Maple Street Cafe restroom
